title: [spec-compliance] Trickle/RPL state machine divergence risk
description: Multiple post-convergence fix commits (c489e110c, 659974465, b0ccfed71 etc) on lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c, rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs, rpl_messages.h. Edge cases in init, interval doubling, counter reset, consistency checks risk Rust vs C divergence. Violates "identical output for test vectors" MUST (test/vectors/rpl_route_state.json), RFC 6206 ordering in spec/05-routing.md and draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md. Requires full cross-impl validation pass on all Trickle transitions.
